chunks.text: iqbal ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2332 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 1718/21 2. For orders on CMA 1719/21 Dated: 22.01.2021 Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Baloch for petitioner. Mr. M. NIshat Warsi, Deputy Attorney General. -.-.- 1) Granted. 2) This petition was disposed of on 09.03.2018 whereby petitioner in substance was directed to be reinstated with back benefits and DE novo inquiry is to be completed in two months’ time with opportunities to be provided to the petitioner to defend the charges. Though petitioner has been reinstated but there are disputes with regard to back benefits and DE novo inquiry, which was to be conducted within two months. Perusal of the order referred above reveals that time was not mandatory in terms of the order as there were no consequences provided in the order. Similarly, if petitioner was deprived of any right while the inquiry being conducted, he may pursue independent remedy for redressal of his grievance however such cannot be probed in this petition under contempt proceedings. Accordingly, the application being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge
